column1: # perf_antipattern_map.tsv -- maps a trace-detected signal to an ABAP code-quality
# rule and a fix template. Read by /sap-trace (references/sap_trace.ps1).

column3: Identical SELECTs repeated -- likely a SELECT inside a LOOP or missing buffering
column4: Pre-select all needed rows into an internal table before the loop; inside the loop use READ TABLE ... BINARY SEARCH or a hashed table.
Replace SELECT * with an explicit field list of only the columns consumed downstream.

column3: FOR ALL ENTRIES without empty-check / SORT+dedupe
column4: Guard with IF lt_keys IS NOT INITIAL; SORT lt_keys and DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES before SELECT ... FOR ALL ENTRIES.

column3: Very high records-per-execution -- likely full table scan / poor index use
column4: Add a selective WHERE on key/indexed fields; verify with ST05 Explain; consider a secondary index.
Add selective WHERE conditions on key/indexed fields; avoid reading the whole table.
Hoist the call out of the loop / buffer the result; aggregate into one set-based read.
Profile the unit; check nested LOOPs, linear READ TABLE (use BINARY SEARCH / hashed table), and avoidable recomputation.
Replace the inner LOOP with READ TABLE ... BINARY SEARCH or a hashed/sorted secondary key.
